ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories of the restaurant (e.g., Restaurant) */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the restaurant's location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the restaurant is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the restaurant */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood's center */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood's center */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_neighborhoods" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that fulfilled the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered, cancelled) */,
  "delivery_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_delivery_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_address_id") REFERENCES delivery_addresses ("delivery_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item */,
  "special_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions for the item (e.g., no MSG, extra cheese) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_addresses" (
  "delivery_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this address is for */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the delivery location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the delivery location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that this item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., appetizer, entree, dessert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_hours" (
  "restaurant_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant hour */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that this hour belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the restaurant opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the restaurant closes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_hours_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that this promotion belongs to */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant that this image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_images_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
